key_facts: Arden Mills reported first-half 2026 revenue of $31.6 million.
Arden Mills reported second-half 2025 revenue of $27.9 million.
Arden Mills reported first-half 2026 operating profit of $4.8 million.
Arden Mills reported second-half 2025 operating profit of $3.5 million.
Arden Mills commissioned two new grain silos during the first half of 2026.
Arden Mills' storage capacity reached 64,000 tonnes in the first half of 2026.
